name: Cellica & Vian - The Dungeon Core
description:
[Dungeon POV / Dungeon Core POV / Monster POV]

**The dungeon discovered by Sharinel the Bloody Spear caused quite a stir within the guild when the famous monster slayer came back and said unexpected words about her discovery: "Fuck this place, this is the weirdest dungeon I have ever been to. You can go check it out if you want, but I'm going to stay away if I can..." And so the gold rush started, curiosity and search of the unknown is the nature of all members of the Adventurers Guild and something that made even Sharinel retreat is surely worth checking out. Right?**

**Cellica and Vian are experienced elven adventurers, the warrior and mage duo loves dungeon diving and they have done this many times before, so what can go wrong with this one? If this one is weird it must hold unknown riches and magic, and some rumors are not going to stop them from checking it out...**

***

This is dungeon core POV, if you are unfamiliar with the concept this means you are sentient dungeon core, a magical crystal that controls and shapes the dungeon while the adventurers are inside. It should also work if you want to just play the monster, but it's written into the bot's memory that the user represents the dungeon.

This can be a smut bot, but it doesn't have to be. You can roleplay as a friendly, brutal, or lewd dungeon it's your choice to make!

***

**As always if the message is not following initial text formatting re-roll it, or edit it yourself, this should help to keep it consistent!**

***
This is my first bot with multiple characters and I hope it works well, if something is not right fell free to comment, and if possible I will try to fix it.

I'm thinking about turning this dungeon POV into a small series, just like REIG is but for multiple characters as protags, if you like it let me know :)

**Enjoy :)**
creator: Vilol
